CULTURE AT PCLOUD

Build products that matter. With people who refuse to compromise.

What It Means to Be pCloud

01

Freedom With Responsibility

We give you the autonomy to make decisions, own your projects, and work in ways that bring out your best. But with freedom comes accountability.

02

High Standards Always

Good enough is never good enough at pCloud. We set the bar high because our users trust us with their most important data.

03

Radical Transparency

Information is shared openly and honestly across all levels. We believe that context enables better decisions, so we default to transparency.

04

Impact Over Process

We care about outcomes, not activities. We won't bog you down with unnecessary meetings, reports, or bureaucracy.

The Principles That Guide Us

01

Trust

We build trust through transparency, consistency, and always doing what we say.

02

Excellence

We pursue mastery in everything we do and never settle for mediocrity.

03

Growth

We invest in continuous learning and push ourselves beyond comfort zones.

04

Privacy

We champion user privacy as a fundamental right, not a feature.

05

Honesty

We communicate with candor and integrity in every interaction.

06

Ownership

We take full responsibility for our work and its impact on users.

Our engineering principles

01

Security first

Every feature, every line of code, every decision starts with security as the foundation.

02

Privacy by design

User privacy is not an afterthought—it is architected into every system from day one.

03

Simplicity over complexity

Simple systems are easier to secure, maintain, and scale. We favor elegance over complexity.

04

Reliability at scale

Build systems that work flawlessly for one user and 24 million users alike.

05

Own what you build

Engineers take full ownership of their code—from conception to deployment to maintenance.

06

Build for the long term

We make decisions that will stand the test of time, not just meet quarterly goals.

pCloud is not for everyone.

And that's exactly how we like it.

If you need constant hand-holding

We give you ownership, context, and trust. Not micromanagement. If you need someone checking on you every hour, this isn't the place.

If you prefer politics over code

We promote based on impact, not office politics. No ladder-climbing. No credit-stealing. Just build great things.

If 99.9% uptime is "good enough"

24 million people depend on us. We obsess over the 0.1%. Every edge case matters. Every failure is personal.

If you stop learning after 5pm

Our best engineers read papers, contribute to open source, and stay curious. Not because we make them — because they can't help it.

Founded in 2013, we

are committed to the

world's leading, secure,

cloud storage platform

“

We are the go-to source for users who want to protect their privacy and control their data.

Tunio Zafer, CEO

Leadership

The Path to a Better You

Continuous Learning

Access to courses, conferences, and resources to keep your skills sharp and your curiosity alive.

Mentorship & Coaching

Learn from experienced engineers and leaders who are invested in your personal and professional growth.

Real Challenges

Work on problems that matter at scale—building systems used by millions of people worldwide.

Career Ownership

Define your own growth path. We support lateral moves, leadership tracks, and deep specialization.

Built for Performance

Small Teams, Big Impact

Autonomous squads that move fast, own their outcomes, and ship meaningful work every week.

Ship Fast, Learn Faster

We iterate rapidly, measure outcomes, and use data to guide our next move.

Context Over Control

We share context widely so everyone can make great decisions without waiting for approvals.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

Engineers, designers, and product managers work side by side from day one.

Debate, Decide, Commit

We encourage healthy debate, but once a decision is made, we commit fully and move forward.

Bias for Action

We prefer doing over discussing. Progress beats perfection when speed matters.

We Take Care of the Team

We believe that great work comes from people who feel valued, supported, and empowered.

Compensation & Financial

Competitive salary, bonuses, and performance rewards.

Health & Wellbeing

Premium health insurance and wellness programs.

Work-Life Balance

Flexible hours, remote options, and generous PTO.

Growth & Learning

Conference budgets, courses, and learning resources.

Team & Social

Team events, retreats, and community activities.

Workspace & Tools

Top-tier equipment and a modern, inspiring office.

Join a Team That Raises the Bar

pCloud is a Swiss cloud storage company founded in 2013.
